microsoft_ft: Owned the **end-to-end product roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, standardizing controls and readiness criteria across 45+ annual drills to drive **$14M+ business impact** for enterprise deployments including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned high-consequence execution workflows to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable validation framework for high-stakes infrastructure deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — navigating privacy-constrained, regulated environments with zero compliance incidents.

Built an **AI agent for drill planning** and restructured investigation workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating how agentic automation can scale complex, multi-step operational programs safely.

Partnered with Policy, Legal, Security, and enterprise product teams to translate ambiguous threat models into concrete mitigation playbooks and deployment readiness criteria for **sensitive, high-trust customer contexts**.

Defined residual-risk metrics and **decision-quality measurement frameworks** for resilience controls, enabling leadership to assess mitigation effectiveness and prioritize enforcement paths across regulated and sovereign-cloud environments.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption for AI-driven workflows**, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly — validating deployment readiness through direct customer feedback loops.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, translating ambiguous feature requests into prioritized requirements and measurable tradeoff frameworks.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval quality** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and establishing a reusable capability for agentic context-assembly workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, turning ambiguous operational gaps into a concrete, metrics-backed product roadmap across 140+ teams.

Drove a product strategy to mitigate operational risk during high-stakes region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region** and building an enforcement-path roadmap to automate critical workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI measurement system** to track operational toil and mitigation effectiveness across 140+ teams, giving leadership the decision-quality instrumentation needed to prioritize high-impact automation and reduce residual deployment risk.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **sensitive-deployment migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit legacy OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating readiness-criteria discipline in a high-consequence, multi-step rollout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and **prioritized the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets, stabilizing the developer intake process and building a repeatable review workflow for complex, cross-functional enforcement paths.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a reusable agentic deployment capability across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building CRM-based workflows that standardized review quality and reduced manual decision-making across the operations team.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, translating ambiguous channel performance signals into a prioritized optimization roadmap for digital presence and lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial risk analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering a tradeoff framework that turned unstructured cost data into actionable mitigation paths for high-value accounts.
